nasb.text: Then he *said to his slaves, ‘The wedding is ready, but those who were invited were not worthy.

esv.text: Then he said to his servants, ‘The wedding feast is ready, but those invited were not worthy.

cnv.text: 然後對僕人說：‘婚筵已經預備好了，只是被邀請的人不配。

ccb.text: “然后，他对奴仆说，‘婚宴已预备好了，只是被邀请的人不配。

csbs.text: “然后对奴仆们说：‘婚宴预备好了，但那些被邀请的人不配。
